name: Chocolate Amaretto Truffles
recipeInstructions: DIRECTIONS: Melt broken chocolate and remove from heat. Stir in the Amaretto liqueur. Add butter, a tablespoon at a time, beating with a wire whip until smooth and creamy. Chill 5 to 10 minutes to firm the mixture. Drop by teaspoonful and roll into nuts. Keep truffles refrigerated until ready to serve.
